disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two-day history of unilateral painful, swollen, warm right calf preceding the acute event
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling or pain in your legs?
When did the leg symptoms start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My right calf has been swollen, warm and really sore for about two days now — the other leg is fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset sharp pleuritic chest pain, worse on deep inspiration, with acute breathlessness
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the chest pain?
Does anything make the pain worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a sharp stabbing pain on the right side of my chest that gets much worse every time I try to breathe in deeply, and I'm struggling to catch my breath.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Haemoptysis — coughing up fresh blood-streaked sputum
trigger_question_examples: Is there any blood when you cough?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: In the last hour I've started coughing up small streaks of fresh blood.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Racing heart / palpitations and a sense of severe breathlessness suggesting cardiorespiratory compromise
trigger_question_examples: Does your heart feel like it's racing?
How is your breathing right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is pounding and racing, and I feel like I just can't get enough air in.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Active malignancy on treatment — major thrombotic risk factor (patient-stated baseline)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any ongoing health conditions?
Are you having any treatment at the moment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got cancer and I'm in the middle of active treatment for it with my oncology team.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms worsen with movement and deep breathing; patient is alone at home
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you at home right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my own at home, and moving or breathing deeply makes the chest pain much worse.
